headlines.description: Juventus beat visitors PSV Eindhoven 3-1 on their Champions League return on Tuesday, helped by two quick-fire goals from Kenan Yildiz and Weston McKennie in the first half.
headlines.shortLinkText: McKennie goal helps Juventus start UCL with win

headlines.description: Aston Villa made an impressive return to Europe's elite as they began their Champions League campaign with an accomplished 3-0 victory away to Swiss club Young Boys on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa win big on return to top European stage

headlines.description: Liverpool celebrated their return to the Champions League after a year's absence with a 3-1 victory over AC Milan at San Siro on Tuesday, overcoming a shaky start with goals from Ibrahima Konate, Virgil van Dijk and Dominik Szoboszlai.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool ease past Milan on return to UCL

headlines.description: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane scored four goals to lead his side to a 9-2 demolition of visitors Dinamo Zagreb on Tuesday and a record for the most goals by one team in a Champions League match after a scintillating performance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores four goals as record-breaking Bayern crush Dinamo Zagreb 9-2

headlines.description: Real Madrid started their Champions League title defence with a hard-fought 3-1 home win over Stuttgart on Tuesday thanks to late goals by Antonio Ruediger and Endrick which cancelled out Deniz Undav's equaliser.
headlines.shortLinkText: Endrick scores 1st UCL goal to cap late Madrid win

headlines.description: Zeno Debast and Viktor Gyokeres fired Sporting Lisbon to a 2-0 Champions League win over 10-man Lille on Tuesday, as defender Angel Gomes was sent off for a second yellow card.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dominant Sporting beat 10-man Lille in UCL

headlines.description: Bologna were held to a 0-0 draw by visitors Shakhtar Donetsk, who missed an early penalty, in a lacklustre Champions League game on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bologna met with goalless stalemate in UCL return

headlines.description: Sparta Prague made a strong return to the Champions League on Wednesday with a 3-0 win over RB Salzburg in their first game in Europe's top club competition in 19 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sparta Prague beat RB Salzburg on UCL return

headlines.description: Celtic kicked off their Champions League campaign with a 5-1 home thrashing of debutants Slovan Bratislava on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic thrash Bratislava in UCL opener

headlines.description: Substitute Jamie Bynoe-Gittens scored two goals and Serhou Guirassy added a late penalty as Borussia Dortmund punished hosts Club Brugge for several wasted chances with a 3-0 win in their Champions League clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bynoe-Gittens double sends Dortmund past Brugge

headlines.description: Inter Milan escaped Etihad Stadium with a surprise 0-0 draw against Premier League heavyweights Manchester City in the Champions League on Wednesday, exacting a small measure of revenge for their narrow loss to City in the 2023 final of Europe's top...
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City held by Inter in '23 UCL final rematch

headlines.description: An embarrassing late blunder gifted Paris St Germain a 1-0 home victory over Champions League debutants Girona on Wednesday as the visitors' goalkeeper Paulo Gazzaniga let a Nuno Mendes cross slip through his legs and into the net.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gazzaniga howler gifts PSG late win over Girona

headlines.description: Germany's 'Invincibles' Bayer Leverkusen opened their Champions League campaign with a resounding 4-0 away win over Feyenoord on Thursday, after running riot in the first half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wirtz nets 2 on UCL debut in big Leverkusen win

headlines.description: A fortuitous goal from winger Kerem Akturkoglu and a superb free-kick by his Turkish compatriot Orkun Kokcu earned Benfica a 2-1 victory at Red Star Belgrade in their Champions League encounter on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Turkish delight as Benfica secures win over Red Star

headlines.description: Barcelona made a disappointing start to their Champions League campaign by losing 2-1 to AS Monaco on Thursday after suffering an early blow from defender Eric Garcia's dismissal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Monaco take down 10-man Barca in Flick's 1st loss

headlines.description: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya secured his side a hard-earned point with a sensational penalty save in a 0-0 draw away to Atalanta in their Champions League opener on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raya heroics help Arsenal claim draw at Atalanta

headlines.description: A late header by defender Jose Maria Gimenez gave Atletico Madrid a 2-1 win over RB Leipzig in their Champions League opener on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gimenez heads Atletico to late win over Leipzig

headlines.description: Brest celebrated winning their first ever match in a European competition on Thursday after goals from Hugo Magnetti and Abdallah Sima secured a 2-1 victory over Sturm Graz in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brest win 1st UCL match for dream European debut

headlines.description: Abdallah Sima scored twice as Brest won 4-0 at RB Salzburg in the Champions League on Tuesday, giving them a perfect start to their first ever European campaign, with both their victories coming against Austrian sides.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brest trounce RB Salzburg to continue perfect UCL start

headlines.description: Stuttgart were held to a 1-1 home draw by Czech champions Sparta Prague in the Champions League on Tuesday after Sparta midfielder Kaan Kairinen cancelled out an early opener by Enzo Millot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart held by Sparta Prague at home

headlines.description: First-half goals by Kai Havertz and Bukayo Saka helped Arsenal seal a 2-0 home victory against Paris St Germain to kickstart their Champions League campaign on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Merino makes debut as Arsenal ease past PSG

headlines.description: Barcelona striker Robert Lewandowski scored twice to set his side on course for a 5-0 Champions League thrashing of Swiss side Young Boys on Tuesday as the Catalan giants bounced back from a 2-1 loss at AS Monaco in their opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona score 5 in runaway win over Young Boys

headlines.description: A second half goal from Victor Boniface was enough to earn Bayer Leverkusen a 1-0 home win over AC Milan in the Champions League on Tuesday, giving the German side a perfect start to their campaign while the Italians are still without a point.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bundesliga champs Leverkusen take down Milan

headlines.description: Karim Adeyemi scored a first-half hat-trick as last season's losing finalists Borussia Dortmund hammered Celtic 7-1 in the Champions League on Tuesday with five goals in the opening 42 minutes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Adeyemi gets hat trick as BVB beat Celtic 7-1

headlines.description: Inter Milan's Mehdi Taremi scored his first goal for his new club and provided two assists to help them secure a comprehensive 4-0 victory over Red Star Belgrade in their Champions League clash at the San Siro on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taremi on target as Inter Milan thump Red Star

headlines.description: Portuguese champions Sporting rescued a 1-1 draw at PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League on Tuesday after substitute Daniel Braganca cancelled out PSV midfielder Jerdy Schouten's first-half opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting rescue late draw at PSV Eindhoven

headlines.description: Ilkay Gündogan, Phil Foden, Erling Haaland and James McAtee got on the scoresheet as Manchester City thrashed Slovan Bratislava 4-0 on Tuesday for their first victory of their Champions League campaign.
headlines.shortLinkText: Foden scores as City's UCL unbeaten run hits 25

headlines.description: David Lopez scored Girona's first ever Champions League goal but the Spanish side lost 3-2 at home to Feyenoord on Wednesday in a pulsating contest in which both teams missed a penalty and there were two own goals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Feyenoord edge luckless Girona in five-goal thriller

headlines.description: Ademola Lookman scored one goal and was heavily involved in the other two to drive Atalanta to a 3-0 win over Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Wednesday as the Italians outclassed their Ukrainian opponents in Gelsenkirchen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lookman shines as Atalanta outclass Shakhtar

headlines.description: Aston Villa beat Bayern Munich 1-0 in the Champions League on Wednesday thanks to a brilliant late Jhon Duran goal as the hosts celebrated in style their first home game in Europe's elite club competition in 41 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Supersub Jhon Duran scores as Villa stun Bayern

headlines.description: Benfica's Kerem Akturkoglu, Angel Di Maria, Alexander Bah and Orkun Kokcu scored in a 4-0 demolition of Atletico Madrid on Wednesday to start their Champions League campaign with two consecutive wins.
headlines.shortLinkText: Di Maria scores as Benfica net 4, trounce Atleti

headlines.description: AS Monaco came from two goals down to snatch a 2-2 draw away to Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League on Wednesday at a rain-sodden Maksimir stadium, with Denis Zakaria equalising with a 90th-minute penalty.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late penalty snatches draw for Monaco at Dinamo Zagreb

headlines.description: Defending champions Real Madrid failed to show the best version of themselves in a shock 1-0 Champions League defeat at Lille on Wednesday and must accept the criticism that comes their way, manager Carlo Ancelotti said.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ancelotti makes no excuses after Real's shock defeat at Lille

headlines.description: Alexis Mac Allister and Mohamed Salah got on the scoresheet as Liverpool beat Bologna 2-0 on Wednesday to remain perfect in their Champions League campaign.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah inspires Liverpool to UCL win over Bologna

headlines.description: Ten-man Juventus twice came from a goal down to stun hosts RB Leipzig 3-2 on Wednesday thanks to Francisco Conceicao's 83rd-minute winner, making it two wins from two matches in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve net late winner in comeback win at Leipzig

name: Club Brugge at SK Sturm Graz

headlines.description: AC Milan secured their first points in the Champions League this season with a 3-1 home win over Belgian champions Club Brugge on Tuesday as Dutch midfielder Tijjani Reijnders scored twice in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Reijnders double helps Milan beat 10-man Brugge

name: Red Star Belgrade at AS Monaco

headlines.description: Monaco forward Takumi Minamino netted a double as they overpowered visitors Red Star Belgrade 5-1 in the Champions League on Tuesday to advance to seven points from their first three matches of this season's competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Minamino double helps Monaco thrash Red Star

headlines.description: Arsenal needed an own goal to seal a scrappy 1-0 win over Shakhtar Donetsk on Tuesday to make it two wins out of three in the Champions League and soften the blow of their first domestic league defeat of season at the weekend.
headlines.shortLinkText: Scrappy Arsenal edge win over Shakhtar Donetsk

headlines.description: Aston Villa beat Bologna 2-0 thanks to second-half goals from John McGinn and Jhon Duran on Tuesday as they extended their perfect start to their first Champions League campaign in 41 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa beat Bologna for third straight UCL win

headlines.description: Girona fullback Miguel Gutiérrez scored in the first half and defender Juanpe added a second from a free kick in the 73rd minute as they beat visitors Slovan Bratislava 2-0 on Tuesday to record their first victory in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Girona beat Slovan Bratislava for 1st UCL win

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart claimed an impressive 1-0 win at Juventus in the Champions League on Tuesday thanks to El Bilal Toure's stoppage-time strike as the hosts suffered their first loss this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart stun Juventus with late winner in Turin

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain's weaknesses on the biggest stage were once again exposed when they were held 1-1 at home by PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League group phase on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lacklustre PSG held to home draw against PSV

headlines.description: Real Madrid fought back from two goals down as Vinícius Júnior grabbed a hat trick in a thrilling 5-2 win over visitors Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vini Jr. nets superb hat trick to crush Dortmund

name: Sporting CP at SK Sturm Graz

headlines.description: Nuno Santos and Viktor Gyokeres scored goals in either half as a dominant Sporting eased to a 2-0 away victory over Sturm Graz in their Champions League clash at the Woerthersee Stadium on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Santos and Gyokeres lead Sporting to 2-0 win at Sturm Graz

headlines.description: Atalanta spurned several chances as they were held to a 0-0 draw at home by a defensively resilient Celtic in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stubborn Celtic hold Atalanta to UCL stalemate

headlines.description: Brest and Bayer Leverkusen played out a 1-1 draw in the Champions League on Wednesday which ended both teams' two-game winning starts to the competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brest draw with Leverkusen to end teams' perfect start

headlines.description: Lille's Jonathan David scored twice as the French side stunned hosts Atletico Madrid with a 3-1 comeback Champions League win on Wednesday to make it two wins from their last two matches while piling more pressure on the struggling Spanish team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lille stun Atlético to do double on Madrid teams

headlines.description: Barcelona captain Raphinha scored a hat-trick to lead them to a commanding 4-1 home victory over Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday, ending a near decade-long winless run against the German powerhouses.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca trounce Bayern as Raphinha scores hat trick

headlines.description: Teenager Antoni Milambo scored twice as Dutch side Feyenoord sprang a Champions League surprise on Wednesday with a 3-1 away win at Portuguese giants Benfica.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milambo double helps Feyenoord win at Benfica

headlines.description: Erling Haaland back-heeled home a stunning strike, the first of two goals on the night for Manchester City's goal-scoring machine, as City cruised past Sparta Prague 5-0 on Wednesday to remain unbeaten in their Champions League campaign.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets acrobatic wonder goal in City rout

headlines.description: Liverpool's Darwin Nunez took full advantage of a rare start with the winning goal in his side's 1-0 victory at RB Leipzig as their 100% start in the Champions League continued on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool edge RB Leipzig for 11th win of season

headlines.description: Sandro Kulenovic and Bruno Petkovic scored second-half goals as Dinamo Zagreb secured a 2-0 Champions League win at 10-man RB Salzburg on Wednesday, only their second ever away victory in the league phase of the competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dinamo Zagreb earn rare away UCL win at Salzburg

headlines.description: Substitute Marcus Thuram scored in stoppage time to give Inter Milan a 1-0 win at Swiss champions Young Boys in the Champions League on Wednesday after the Italian side had missed a penalty early in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Thuram goal earns Inter win at Young Boys

headlines.description: Ryan Flamingo and Malik Tillman scored first half goals as a dominant PSV Eindhoven picked up a first win of their Champions League campaign with an impressive 4-0 victory over 10-man Girona at the Philips Stadion on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tillman solo goal helps PSV to big 1st UCL win

headlines.description: Dinamo Zagreb eased to a convincing 4-1 victory at Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League on Tuesday, recovering from an early scare to dominate the match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dinamo Zagreb thrash Slovan Bratislava in UCL

headlines.description: AS Monaco defender Thilo Kehrer snatched a late goal to earn a 1-0 victory at Bologna in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Kehrer goal gives Monaco win at Bologna

name: SK Sturm Graz at Borussia Dortmund

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund substitute Donyell Malen scored an 85th minute goal to secure a 1-0 victory over Sturm Graz in the Champions League on Tuesday and make it three wins from four matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund substitute Malen scores late for 1-0 win over Sturm Graz

headlines.description: Celtic's Nicolas Kuehn scored twice and Reo Hatate added another as the Scottish champions fought back to beat RB Leipzig 3-1 in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic fight back to claim UCL win over Leipzig

headlines.description: Lille kept their composure to hold Juventus to a 1-1 home draw on Tuesday as the French side maintained their solid form in the group phase of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lille hold firm to earn 1-1 draw with Juve

headlines.description: Liverpool's Luis Diaz scored a second-half hat trick as they maintained their perfect Champions League campaign with a 4-0 victory over Bundesliga side Bayer Leverkusen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Diaz hat trick extends Liverpool's perfect UCL run

headlines.description: AC Milan's Malick Thiaw, Alvaro Morata and Tijjani Reijnders all got on the scoresheet in a surprise 3-1 win at holders Real Madrid in their Champions League clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan stun UCL holders Real Madrid at Bernabeu

headlines.description: Sporting marked the final home game of coach Ruben Amorim's reign in stunning fashion as Viktor Gyokeres' hat-trick saw them come from behind to thrash Manchester City 4-1 and maintain their superb start to the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland pen miss as Amorim's Sporting dump City

headlines.description: Aston Villa conceded a bizarre penalty in a 1-0 loss at Club Brugge on Wednesday which ended their perfect start to the Champions League group stage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aston Villa lose in Brugge after bizarre handball

headlines.description: Shakhtar Donetsk staged a quick comeback to secure a 2-1 home victory over Swiss side Young Boys in their Champions League group clash on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shakhtar fight back to sink Young Boys

headlines.description: Striker Karim Konate snatched a double as Salzburg scored their first goals of the Champions League group competition and also picked up their first points with a surprise 3-1 away win at Feyenoord on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salzburg win first UCL points away vs. Feyenoord

headlines.description: Inter Milan's Hakan Çalhanoglu maintained his incredible penalty record as his spot-kick secured a 1-0 victory for the Italians over Arsenal in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal struggles continue in UCL loss to Inter

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain's disappointing Champions League campaign continued on Wednesday as they slumped to a last-gasp 2-1 home defeat by Atlético Madrid that left the Ligue 1 leaders in the elimination zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Correa nets late winner as Atleti beat PSG away

headlines.description: Barcelona striker Robert Lewandowski scored a goal in each half to help them secure a comprehensive 5-2 win at Red Star Belgrade in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca stutter, then storm past Red Star Belgrade

headlines.description: Brest secured a 2-1 victory at Sparta Prague in their Champions League clash on Wednesday, with a first-half goal from Edimilson Fernandes and a late own goal from Sparta in the second half sealing the win for the French side.
headlines.shortLinkText: UCL surprise package Brest beat Sparta Prague

headlines.description: Second-half goals from Ademola Lookman and Nicolo Zaniolo earned Atalanta a 2-0 win at VfB Stuttgart in the Champions League on Wednesday and the Italian side are still yet to concede a goal in this season's competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lookman, Zaniolo fire Atalanta to win over Stuttgart

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Jamal Musiala headed home in the second half to give the hosts a 1-0 victory over Benfica in the Champions League on Wednesday as they bounced back from two consecutive defeats in the competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Musiala nets for Bayern in victory over Benfica

headlines.description: AC Milan earned their third successive Champions League win with a 3-2 victory at Slovan Bratislava on Tuesday, hanging on after the home side scored a late goal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic, Abraham earn Milan 3rd-straight UCL win

headlines.description: Argentina forward Julián Álvarez and substitute Angel Correa scored two goals each while Marcos Llorente and Antoine Griezmann added to the feast as Atlético Madrid thumped home side Sparta Prague 6-0 in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Álvarez gets on track as Atlético score 6 in rout

headlines.description: Robert Lewandowski scored his 100th Champions League goal in Barcelona's 3-0 victory over Brest on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski hits 100 UCL goals in Barça win

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen got their Champions League campaign back on track with a 5-0 home win over RB Salzburg on Tuesday, with Florian Wirtz scoring twice and the visitors having goalkeeper Alexander Schlager to thank for avoiding an even bigger defeat.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen trash Salzburg 5-0 in Champions League

headlines.description: Bayern Munich battled past 10-man Paris St Germain 1-0 in the Champions League thanks to Kim Min-jae's winner on Tuesday to improve their chances of automatic qualification and leave the visitors in trouble after a third loss in the competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-man PSG drop to 26th in narrow loss to Bayern

headlines.description: An own goal by RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba gave Inter Milan a 1-0 home win in the Champions League on Tuesday as the Italian champions provisionally moved top of the standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Unbeaten Inter claim top Champions League spot

headlines.description: Manchester City squandered a three-goal lead to draw 3-3 with Dutch side Feyenoord in the Champions League on Tuesday in another calamitous performance from Pep Guardiola's stuttering side.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City squander lead as winless run hits six

headlines.description: Bukayo Saka scored one goal and set up another as Arsenal thrashed Portuguese side Sporting 5-1 in their Champions League clash at the Estadio Jose Alvalade on Tuesday, their biggest away win in the competition in 21 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal fix UCL road woes, hit 5 past Sporting

headlines.description: Charles De Ketelaere was the driving force for Atalanta in their commanding 6-1 win at Young Boys in the Champions League on Tuesday, providing three assists and scoring two goals.
headlines.shortLinkText: De Ketelaere steals show as Atalanta trounce Young Boys

name: VfB Stuttgart at Red Star Belgrade

headlines.description: Red Star Belgrade came from a goal down to thrash visitors VfB Stuttgart 5-1 in the Champions League on Wednesday and earn their first points in the competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Red Star thrash Stuttgart to earn first UCL points

headlines.description: Girona lost 1-0 at Sturm Graz in the Champions League on Wednesday as Mika Biereth's second-half goal secured the hosts' first points of the competition's league phase.
headlines.shortLinkText: Martin howler sees Girona fall to Sturm Graz

headlines.description: Aston Villa had to settle for a 0-0 draw with Juventus in the Champions League on Wednesday after a last-gasp effort by Morgan Rogers was chalked off for a foul on Juventus keeper Michele Di Gregorio.
headlines.shortLinkText: Emi makes stunning save in Villa draw with Juve

headlines.description: Jhon Lucumi scored Bologna's first goal of the Champions League but they fell to a 2-1 home defeat by Lille on Wednesday, with Ngal'ayel Mukau netting twice for the visitors.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mukau double earns Lille win at Bologna

headlines.description: Celtic and Club Brugge played out a 1-1 draw in the Champions League on Wednesday, with Daizen Maeda equalising after an own goal by defender Cameron Carter-Vickers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic earn UCL point despite comical own goal

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund eased past hosts Dinamo Zagreb 3-0 in the Champions League on Wednesday to stay firmly on course for a top-eight finish and automatic qualification to the knockout stage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund score three to ease past Dinamo Zagreb

headlines.description: Liverpool took top spot in the Champions League table Wednesday with a dominant 2-0 victory over holders Real Madrid thanks to goals from Alexis Mac Allister and Cody Gakpo.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool beat Madrid as Salah, Mbappé miss pens

headlines.description: Malik Tillman scored two late goals before substitute Ricardo Pepi netted five minutes into stoppage time to see PSV Eindhoven stage a dramatic comeback against 10-man Shakhtar Donetsk and win 3-2 in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: USMNT's Pepi, Tillman lead PSV comeback win

headlines.description: Dinamo Zagreb and Celtic played out a lifeless 0-0 draw in the Champions League on Tuesday, with Celtic keeper Kasper Schmeichel producing the match's memorable moment with a late save.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Schmeichel stop salvages Celtic draw with Zagreb

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah's penalty helped Liverpool maintain their 100% record in this season's Champions League with a 1-0 win at Girona on Tuesday
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool win 1-0 at Girona to stay perfect in UCL

headlines.description: Real Madrid got a much-needed 3-2 Champions League win at Atalanta on Tuesday thanks to goals from Kylian Mbappe, Vinicius Jr and Jude Bellingham as the holders snapped a two-game loosing run in the competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beat Atalanta to jumpstart UCL campaign

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen's Nordi Mukiele scored a 90th-minute goal to give his team a 1-0 win over Inter Milan in the Champions League on Tuesday and move the Germans closer to qualification.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen edge Inter with late Mukiele winner

headlines.description: Brest hold off PSV Eindhoven to stay in Champions League top-8
headlines.shortLinkText: Brest beat PSV to continue unlikely top-8 bid

headlines.description: Club Brugge bounced back from conceding after three minutes to beat Sporting 2-1 on Tuesday in a major boost to their hopes of advancing to the next stage of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge boost UCL hopes with win over Sporting

headlines.description: Aston Villa substitutes Jhon Duran and Ross Barkley bagged second-half goals to salvage a 3-2 victory over RB Leipzig on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barkley strike keeps Villa in great spot for top-8

headlines.description: A fine finish from Goncalo Ramos, a goal from Nuno Mendes and a late strike from Desire Doue gave Paris St Germain a vital Champions League victory, as they beat RB Salzburg 3-0 on Tuesday to move into the playoff spots.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG beat Salzburg to move back in qualifying spots

headlines.description: Michael Olise netted a second-half brace as Bayern Munich came back from conceding an early goal to win 5-1 against Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Five-star Bayern thrash Shakhtar to earn vital win

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann scored twice as Atletico Madrid claimed a 10th win in a row in all competitions with a comfortable 3-1 home victory over Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Griezmann nets 2 as Atlético win streak up to 10

headlines.description: Lille secured a 3-2 victory over visitors Sturm Graz in a Champions League thriller on Wednesday, with substitute Hakon Arnar Haraldsson scoring a late winner.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haraldsson's late goal seals 3-2 win for Lille over Sturm Graz

name: Red Star Belgrade at AC Milan

headlines.description: A late Tammy Abraham goal gave AC Milan a thrilling 2-1 Champions League win over Red Star Belgrade at the San Siro on Wednesday to make it four wins in a row for the Italian side.
headlines.shortLinkText: Abraham nets late winner as Milan edge Red Star

headlines.description: Arsenal took a giant step towards the Champions League knockout stage as Bukayo Saka once again proved the catalyst as his double helped them to a 3-0 victory over AS Monaco on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saka double sees Arsenal ease past Monaco

headlines.description: Wasteful Benfica struggled to a 0-0 home against Bologna in the Champions League on Wednesday as visiting keeper Lukasz Skorupski made crucial saves to keep the hosts out.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica held as Skorupski stands tall for Bologna

headlines.description: Substitute Ferran Torres scored twice including an 85th-minute winner as Barcelona earned a hard-fought 3-2 victory at Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League on Wednesday to move to the brink of qualification.
headlines.shortLinkText: Torres double helps Barcelona down Dortmund late

headlines.description: Feyenoord beat Sparta Prague to reach 10-point mark in UCL
headlines.shortLinkText: Feyenoord beat Sparta to reach 10-point mark in UCL

headlines.description: Dusan Vlahovic and Weston McKennie got on the scoresheet to lead Juventus to a 2-0 Champions League victory over Manchester City on Wednesday in a big blow to City's hopes of clinching a top-eight spot in Europe's elite competition. Pep Guardiola's...
headlines.shortLinkText: McKennie scores as Juve add to Man City's woes

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart came back from a goal down to win 5-1 and deal Swiss side Young Boys a sixth defeat in six Champions League games on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rampant Stuttgart condemn Young Boys to sixth defeat in six games

headlines.description: Monaco edged out Aston Villa 1-0 at home in the Champions League on Tuesday with an early goal from Wilfried Singo.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa's UCL hopes dented by defeat at Monaco

headlines.description: Europa League winners Atalanta thrashed Sturm Graz 5-0 in the Champions League on Tuesday with Gian Piero Gasperini's side well placed to earn a spot in the competition's top eight.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta beat Sturm Graz, firm up UCL top 8 spot

headlines.description: Atlético Madrid fought back to rescue a 2-1 win over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atlético fight back to beat Leverkusen 2-1

headlines.description: Raphinha scored deep into stoppage time to hand Barcelona a dramatic 5-4 comeback win at Benfica and a place in the last 16 of the Champions League on Tuesday after a hat-trick from Vangelis Pavlidis gave the hosts a two-goal halftime lead.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raphinha seals wild Barça rally to clinch top-8

headlines.description: Bologna struck twice in two minutes to bag a 2-1 comeback win over Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League on Tuesday and earn their first win in the competition while piling pressure on the embattled Germans who suffered a fourth straight loss...
headlines.shortLinkText: Bologna stun Dortmund with two-goal comeback

headlines.description: Juventus were held to a 0-0 draw at Belgian champions Club Brugge in a largely uneventful Champions League clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve UCL top 8 hopes dented in Brugge draw

headlines.description: Liverpool booked their spot in the Champions League round-of-16 with a 2-1 victory over 10-man Lille on Tuesday at Anfield, thanks to goals from talisman Mohamed Salah and substitute Harvey Elliott.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool edge Lille, confirm UCL top 8 spot

name: PSV Eindhoven at Red Star Belgrade

headlines.description: Luuk de Jong scored a brace as 10-man PSV Eindhoven earned a 3-2 Champions League win over Red Star Belgrade on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-man PSV earn nervy 3-2 win over Red Star

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart beat Bratislava to stay in UCL playoff hunt
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart beat Bratislava, stay in playoff hunt

headlines.description: RB Leipzig battled past visitors Sporting 2-1 on Wednesday to earn their first victory in seven Champions League matches and dent their opponents' hopes of a top eight finish.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting stumble in top 8 quest with Leipzig loss

headlines.description: Shakhtar Donetsk kept their Champions League hopes alive as they secured a vital 2-0 home win over Brest on Wednesday thanks to a brilliant strike from Kevin and a well-taken penalty from Georgiy Sudakov.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shakhtar beat Brest to keep knockout hopes alive

headlines.description: A first-half goal by winger Rafael Leao helped AC Milan to a 1-0 home win against Girona in the Champions League on Wednesday, leaving the Italians well-placed to book a spot in the last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leão earns AC Milan narrow win over Girona

headlines.description: Arsenal all but secured a spot in the Champions League knockout phase as they outclassed visitors Dinamo Zagreb 3-0 on Wednesday thanks to with goals from Declan Rice, Kai Havertz and Martin Odegaard.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal all but seal top-8 after win over Zagreb

headlines.description: An own goal five minutes from time gave Celtic a 1-0 victory over Young Boys in the Champions League on Wednesday and took the Scottish side past the competition's group stage for the first time in 12 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic beat Young Boys, reach UCL knockout stage

headlines.description: Feyenoord striker Santiago Gimenez scored twice in the first half to steer the hosts to a 3-0 victory over Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday and boost their chances of a top-eight finish on the last matchday next week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern stunned by Feyenoord, facing playoff round

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain clawed back from two goals down to stun Manchester City 4-2 in the Champions League on Wednesday and leave the English club outside the playoff places and in danger of elimination.
headlines.shortLinkText: City on brink in UCL after PSG 4-goal comeback

headlines.description: Holders Real Madrid hammered RB Salzburg 5-1 in a Champions League clash in the Spanish capital on Wednesday thanks to doubles from Brazilian forwards Rodrygo and Vinicius Jr either side of a goal by Kylian Mbappe.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid get big UCL win with Rodrygo, Vini doubles

headlines.description: Lautaro Martínez scored a superb first-half volley as Inter Milan claimed a 1-0 Champions League victory over hosts Sparta Prague
headlines.shortLinkText: Martínez goal sees Inter edge Sparta Prague

headlines.description: Morgan Rogers scored hat-trick and Ollie Watkins opened his Champions League account as Aston Villa beat Celtic 4-2 in a breathtaking game to seal their last-16 spot on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rogers hat trick helps Villa seal top 8 CL finish

headlines.description: Europa League champions Atalanta missed out on an automatic place in the Champions League last 16 with a 2-2 draw at Barcelona on Wednesday, with Lamine Yamal and Ronald Araujo scoring for the already-qualified hosts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barça miss chance to top UCL with Atalanta draw

headlines.description: A goal in each half sent Bayer Leverkusen into the Champions League round of 16 on Wednesday with a comfortable 2-0 win over a toothless Sparta Prague side unable to offer much resistance to the German champions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen secure RO16 progress with Prague win

headlines.description: Bayern Munich eased past Slovan Bratislava 3-1 in the Champions League on Wednesday but the Germans missed out on a top eight finish and automatic qualification and will go into a playoff for a spot in the Round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern beat Bratislava but miss out on top-8

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund cruised through to the knockout phase play-offs of the Champions League with a 3-1 home win over Shakhtar Donetsk on Wednesday, with Guinean striker Serhou Guirassy grabbing two first-half goals as the Ukrainian side were eliminated.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund beat Shakhtar Donetsk 3-1 to progress to Champions League knockout play-offs

headlines.description: Holders Real Madrid made sure they would be seeded for Friday's Champions League playoff draw by beating Stade Brest 3-0 away in the last round of the first phase on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid rout Brest to earn UCL playoff seed

headlines.description: AC Milan will have to play in the Champions League's knockout phase playoffs after missing out on an automatic last-16 spot with a 2-1 defeat at Dinamo Zagreb, whose victory on Wednesday was not enough for them to progress.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan miss out on UCL top-8 despite Pulisic goal

headlines.description: Arsenal secured a spot in the Champions League round of 16 as they rallied from a goal down to win 2-1 at Girona on Wednesday thanks to goals from Jorginho and Ethan Nwaneri.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal into RO16 with comeback win vs Girona

headlines.description: Captain Lautaro Martinez netted a hat-trick to become Inter Milan's most prolific scorer in the Champions League as they eased to a 3-0 victory over the 10 men of Monaco at the San Siro on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Martinez hat trick sees Inter ease to Monaco win

headlines.description: Benfica secured their place in the Champions League playoffs with a 2-0 win away to Juventus, who were already assured of their playoff spot coming into the final game of the league phase on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica progress to playoffs with win at Juventus

headlines.description: Lille gatecrashed the top eight of the Champions League standings and booked an unexpected place in the last-16 as they hammered hapless Feyenoord 6-1 at home on Wednesday on the last night of the group competition.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lille gatecrash UCL top eight with six-goal rout

headlines.description: Manchester City kept their Champions League campaign alive by beating Belgian side Club Brugge 3-1 in a nervy must-win match on Wednesday thanks to goals from Mateo Kovacic and substitute Savinho, and a Brugge own goal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City scrape into UCL knockouts with Brugge win

headlines.description: Liverpool teenager Amara Nallo learned a harsh lesson as he was sent off four minutes after coming off the bench to make his senior debut in the Champions League game at PSV Eindhoven on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pepi scores for PSV as Liverpool miss 100% record

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid booked their place in the last 16 of the Champions League with a top-eight finish and automatic qualification after a decisive 4-0 win over RB Salzburg on Wednesday including a double from Antoine Griezmann.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico Madrid thrash RB Salzburg 4-1 to reach Champions League last 16

name: RB Leipzig at SK Sturm Graz

headlines.description: Conrad Harder's second-half strike ensured Sporting's progress to the Champions League's playoffs after the Portuguese side secured a 1-1 draw with Bologna on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting edge into UCL playoffs with late Harder goal

headlines.description: Ousmane Dembele played chief tormentor as Paris Saint-Germain secured a playoff spot in the Champions League with a 4-1 away demolition of VfB Stuttgart on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dembele hat trick books PSG spot in UCL playoffs

name: Red Star Belgrade at Young Boys

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain seized control of their Champions League knockout phase playoff with a commanding 3-0 first-leg win at Brest on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG ease past Brest in UCL after Dembélé double

headlines.description: Juventus substitute Samuel Mbangula snatched a late winner and U.S. midfielder Weston McKennie scored a stunning goal as the Italian giants beat PSV Eindhoven 2-1 in the first leg of their Champions League knockout phase playoff tie on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: McKennie stunner helps Juve take lead over PSV

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham struck a last-gasp goal to give holders Real Madrid a 3-2 first-leg victory in an edge-of-your-seat Champions League knockout phase playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham gives Madrid 3-2 lead as City slip up

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund forward Serhou Guirassy scored one and set up another in a 3-0 victory at Sporting in their Champions League playoff first leg on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: BVB take commanding first-leg lead over Sporting

headlines.description: A controversial stoppage-time penalty by substitute Gustaf Nilsson secured Club Brugge a 2-1 first-leg win against Atalanta
headlines.shortLinkText: Controversial pen gives Brugge win over Atalanta

headlines.description: Benfica took a big step towards the Champions League last 16 with a 1-0 victory at 10-man AS Monaco in the first leg of the playoffs on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pavlidis strike gives Benfica UCL edge over Monaco

headlines.description: Bayern Munich scored either side of halftime through Michael Olise and Harry Kane but had to endure late pressure from hosts Celtic before securing a 2-1 victory in their Champions League playoff first leg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Olise, Kane fire Bayern to first-leg win over Celtic

headlines.description: A goalkeeping howler handed Feyenoord a 1-0 home win over AC Milan in an action-packed first leg of their Champions League knockout phase playoff tie on Wednesday, just two days after the Dutch club fired their coach.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maignan error costs Milan in Feyenoord UCL defeat

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Feyenoord Rotterdam advance 2-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Feyenoord Rotterdam advance 2-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Feyenoord came from behind to draw 1-1 at AC Milan thanks to a goal from substitute Julian Carranza on Tuesday to earn a 2-1 aggregate playoff win and a place in the Champions League last 16, with the hosts having Theo Hernandez sent off.
headlines.shortLinkText: Feyenoord dump Milan from Champions League

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Club Brugge advance 5-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Club Brugge advance 5-2 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 3-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies snatched a last-gasp equaliser against Celtic for a 1-1 draw on Tuesday to advance to the Champions League Round of 16 with a 3-2 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern nip Celtic to advance on late Davies goal

headlines.description: Benfica held determined AS Monaco to a 3-3 draw in a thrilling second leg of their Champions League knockout phase playoff on Tuesday for a 4-3 aggregate win that earned the hosts a place in the competition's last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica see off Monaco in thriller to reach last 16

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 3-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 3-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund sailed into the last 16 of the Champions League after a comfortable 0-0 draw with Sporting in the second leg of their knockout phase playoff on Wednesday, giving last year's runners-up a 3-0 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund ease into last 16 despite scoreless draw

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 10-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 10-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain cruised into the Champions League last 16 with a crushing 10-0 aggregate triumph over Brest.
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-0 aggregate: PSG thrash Brest in UCL playoff

notes.text: 2nd Leg - PSV Eindhoven advance 4-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - PSV Eindhoven advance 4-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: Defender Ryan Flamingo scored an extra-time winner to give PSV Eindhoven a 3-1 home win on Wednesday in the second leg of their Champions League knockout phase playoff tie against Juventus, overturning a first-leg deficit and putting them through to...
headlines.shortLinkText: PSV stun Juventus in ET, secure UCL last-16 spot

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 6-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 6-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: Real Madrid beat Manchester City 3-1 with a Kylian Mbappé hat trick on Wednesday in their Champions League playoff second leg at a raucous Santiago Bernabéu stadium, earning them a 6-3 aggregate victory and a place in the last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid move on as Mbappé hat trick buries City

headlines.description: Aston Villa earned a 3-1 win away to Club Brugge in their Champions League last-16 first leg in Belgium on Tuesday, thanks to an own goal and a penalty kick in the final eight minutes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa strike late to close in on UCL quarterfinals

headlines.description: Lille scored with their first shot on target in the 68th minute to snatch an equaliser in a 1-1 draw at Borussia Dortmund in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lille snatch draw at Dortmund in UCL first leg

headlines.description: Arsenal rattled in three goals in a 13-minute spell in the first half and then ruthlessly added four more after the break as they thrashed PSV Eindhoven 7-1 away in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal make UCL history with 7-1 rout of PSV

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Brahim Diaz scored a second-half winner as the hosts edged out neighbours Atletico Madrid 2-1 in a scrappy first leg of their Champions League Round of 16 tie on Tuesday after Julian Alvarez had cancelled out Rodrygo's opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beat Atlético in first leg of UCL derby

headlines.description: Inter Milan secured a 2-0 victory at Feyenoord in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Wednesday with goals from Marcus Thuram and Lautaro Martinez.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter secure 1st-leg advantage over Feyenoord

headlines.description: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane scored once in each half to guide his team to a 3-0 victory over 10-man Bayer Leverkusen in the all-German Champions League round of 16 first-leg match on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane double gives Bayern edge over Leverkusen

headlines.description: Raphinha struck a second-half winner to give Barcelona a lion-hearted 1-0 victory at Benfica on Wednesday as they overcame a red card for Pau Cubarsi early in the game to steal an advantage in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raphinha gives 10-man Barça 1st-leg advantage

headlines.description: Liverpool substitute Harvey Elliott scored a last-gasp winner less than a minute after coming on to earn a fortunate 1-0 win against Paris Saint-Germain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Alisson, Elliott star as Liverpool steal win at PSG

headlines.description: Raphinha scored twice and Lamine Yamal netted with a stunning strike as a superb Barcelona dismantled Benfica 3-1 in the second leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Tuesday, advancing to the quarter-finals with a 4-1 aggregate victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yamal, Raphinha dazzle as Barca reach UCL last-8

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 5-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 5-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Harry Kane scored one goal and set up another as his side beat hosts Bayer Leverkusen 2-0 in the Champions League last-16 second leg on Tuesday to advance with a 5-0 aggregate win to the last eight where they will face Inter Milan.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern seal Leverkusen rout, spot in quarters

headlines.description: Marcus Thuram and Hakan Çalhanoglu were on target as Inter Milan beat Feyenoord 2-1 in the second leg of their Champions League last-16 tie at the San Siro on Tuesday to advance comfortably into the quarterfinals with a 4-1 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter ease past Feyenoord to set up Bayern QF

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Paris Saint-Germain advance 4-1 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Paris Saint-Germain advance 4-1 on penalties

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain beat Liverpool 4-1 in a penalty shootout to advance to the Champions League quarterfinals after winning a rip-roaring last-16 second-leg match at Anfield 1-0 on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG oust Liverpool in shootout to reach UCL last 8

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 3-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund reached the Champions League quarterfinals for the second year in a row as second-half goals by Emre Can and Maximilian Beier gave them a 2-1 win at Lille for a 3-2 aggregate victory on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund edge Lille to advance to QF with Barça

headlines.description: Arsenal eased into the quarterfinals of the Champions League with a 9-3 aggregate victory over PSV Eindhoven.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal ease past PSV, set up Real Madrid QF

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Aston Villa advance 6-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Aston Villa advance 6-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Aston Villa marched into the Champions League quarterfinals on Wednesday with an easy 3-0 win over 10-man Club Brugge to set up a far tougher task next against Paris Saint-Germain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Asensio propels Villa to UCL quarterfinal with PSG

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Real Madrid advance 4-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Real Madrid advance 4-2 on penalties

headlines.description: Real Madrid beat city rivals Atlético 4-2 on penalties to reach the Champions League quarterfinals following an enthralling round-of-16 tie, which ended 2-2 on aggregate after extra time on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Álvarez pen ruled out as Real advance past Atleti

headlines.description: Declan Rice's two fantastic free kicks and a striker's finish from Mikel Merino gave Arsenal an emphatic 3-0 victory over Real Madrid in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rice's stunning double helps Arsenal rout Madrid

headlines.description: Inter Milan scored an 88th minute winner through Davide Frattesi to snatch a 2-1 victory over hosts Bayern Munich in their Champions League quarter-final first leg on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late strike gives Inter 1st-leg edge over Bayern

headlines.description: Imperious Barcelona thumped visitors Borussia Dortmund 4-0 in their Champions League quarter-final first leg on Wednesday after Robert Lewandowski netted twice against his old club to earn the Catalans a sizeable lead.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski leads Barcelona in rout of Dortmund

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain were made to sweat to secure a 3-1 win over Aston Villa in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final, coming from behind after a shock opener from the visitors on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG strike late blow to Villa after Kvara magic

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 5-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 5-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain kept alive their dream of a first Champions League title on Tuesday by squeezing past Aston Villa 5-4 on aggregate after a thrilling second leg of their quarterfinal which the English side won 3-2.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG survive thrilling Villa comeback to reach SF

headlines.description: Five-time European champions Barcelona reached their first Champions League semifinal in six seasons with a 5-3 aggregate victory despite being beaten 3-1 by Borussia Dortmund on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barça stumble into UCL semis, unbeaten run ends

headlines.description: Inter Milan reached the Champions League semi-finals with a 4-3 aggregate win over Bayern Munich after an enthralling 2-2 draw in the second leg of their quarter-final tie at the San Siro on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter Milan fends off Bayern, advances to semifinals

headlines.description: Arsenal snuffed out any chance of a famous Real Madrid comeback to reach the Champions League semifinals after a 2-1 victory in the Bernabéu Stadium completed a 5-1 aggregate win on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal oust Madrid, reach 1st UCL semi since '09

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain took a big step toward reaching the Champions League final as Ousmane Dembélé's early goal sealed a 1-0 win at Arsenal in a tense first leg of the semifinal on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dembélé gives PSG semifinal edge over Arsenal

headlines.description: Barcelona twice battled back to draw 3-3 at home against Inter Milan in a rip-roaring first leg of their Champions League semifinal in Olympic Stadium at Montjuïc on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barça battle back for draw in goalfest with Inter

headlines.description: Inter Milan substitute Davide Frattesi struck an extra-time winner to send his side into the Champions League final following a barnstorming 4-3 victory over Barcelona on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter stun Barça in extra time, advance to final

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain weathered an early Arsenal storm before goals by Fabian Ruiz and Achraf Hakimi sealed a 2-1 victory to send them into the Champions League final on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG oust Arsenal in semis, set up final with Inter

headlines.description: Désiré Doué scored twice to inspire Paris Saint-Germain to their first European Cup triumph with an emphatic 5-0 win over Inter Milan in a one-sided Champions League final on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG humble Inter 5-0 to win Champions League final
